name: Zucchini Fiesta Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the zucchini and crookneck squash crosswise into 1/4 inch-thick slices.
2. Cut the pimento-stuffed olives in half crosswise.
3. Cut the small avocado into small cubes.
4. Steam the zucchini and crookneck squash over boiling water until crisp-tender (about 3 minutes). Remove from heat, then plunge into ice water to cool; drain well.
5. In a large bowl, whisk together lemon juice, oil, salt, cumin, and pepper.
6. Add the drained zucchini and squash to the dressing and stir lightly.
7. Chill for 30 minutes.
8. Add the green onions, diced green chilies, pimento-stuffed olives, and cream cheese to the salad; mix lightly.
9. To serve, arrange lettuce leaves on four salad plates. Mound equal portions of salad on each plate. Garnish each salad with a sprig of coriander.
